name: buildkite
description: Generated TGG ruleset: buildkite CST <-> Hub-IR. Bidirectional — the engine derives CST->IR and IR->CST from this one set (model a).

rules.documentation: buildkite: user `# foo` comment under dependency_edge <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_buildkite_pipeline_notifications_notify_item_map
